name: gw2-blish-hud
description: Develop, audit, and localize Guild Wars 2 Blish HUD, modules, and Pathing/TacO marker packs, with a focus on Traditional Chinese and CJK support.

interface.shortDescription: Develop and localize Blish HUD, modules, and Pathing packs
interface.longDescription: Audit, diagnose, and maintain Guild Wars 2 Blish HUD core, localized modules, Pathing/TacO route packs, resource fallback, satellite assemblies, and CJK font support, especially for Traditional Chinese.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Blish HUD localization for missing keys and culture fallback.
Localize this Blish HUD module for Traditional Chinese.
Design a localized Pathing/TacO route-pack workflow.
